demo.title: CMSBar runs in this Vite SPA host
demo.intro: This paragraph and the heading above are rendered by the framework-neutral CMS primitives. There is no SSR here: the SPA boots, fetches its session from the Hono companion, and hydrates the editor entirely on the client.
